---
name: Good first issue
about: Maintainer-only template for scoping a small, contributor-friendly task
title: ""
labels: ["type: task", "good first issue", "status: ready", "effort: small"]
---

<!--
This template is for maintainers preparing a well-scoped issue that a
first-time contributor can pick up without a long onboarding conversation.

A good "good first issue" is:
  - small (a few hours of work)
  - touches only one area
  - has a clear definition of done
  - does not depend on unfinished work

If you cannot fill in all the sections below confidently, this issue is
probably not yet ready to be a good first issue.
-->

## What needs to happen

<!-- A clear, concrete description of the work, in plain language. -->

## Why this matters

<!-- The user-visible or developer-visible benefit. One or two sentences. -->

## Where to start

<!--
Point the contributor at the right files. Examples:
  - The relevant module: apps/api/src/modules/<x>/
  - A similar pattern to copy from: <file path>
  - A specific function to add or change: <file path>:<line>
-->

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## How to test

<!--
The exact command to verify the change locally. Examples:
  - bun --filter '@mt-commerce/api' test <path>
  - bun --filter '@mt-commerce/storefront' dev
-->

## Out of scope

<!-- Things that look related but should NOT be done in this issue. -->

## Need help?

If you get stuck, leave a comment on this issue. Maintainers reply on a
weekly cadence. Discussions in Bahasa Indonesia or English are equally
welcome.
